title: Stryker Corporation (SYK)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Stryker using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what Stryker is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-mrpccrzy>
Stryker's revenue grew over 11% in FY2025, supported by strong demand in MedSurg and Neurotechnology. FCF growth was highly volatile historically but has robust momentum now. 11% reflects expected continued growth driven by Mako robot placements, an aging population, and M&A integration.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)

" data-astro-cid-mrpccrzy>

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Why use an 8% discount rate?
